top3.sql:
SELECT element
FROM atom
WHERE molecule_id IN (
    SELECT molecule_id
    FROM molecule
    WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
)
GROUP BY element
ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT element
FROM atom
WHERE molecule_id IN (
    SELECT molecule_id
    FROM molecule
    WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
)
GROUP BY element
ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT element
FROM atom
WHERE molecule_id IN (
    SELECT molecule_id
    FROM molecule
    WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
)
GROUP BY element
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MIN(cnt)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM atom
        WHERE molecule_id IN (
            SELECT molecule_id
            FROM molecule
            WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
        )
        GROUP BY element
    )
);

SELECT element
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
GROUP BY a.element
ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT element
FROM atom
WHERE molecule_id IN (
    SELECT molecule_id
    FROM molecule
    WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
)
GROUP BY element
ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH carcinogenic_atoms AS (
    SELECT element
    FROM atom
    WHERE molecule_id IN (
        SELECT molecule_id
        FROM molecule
        WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
    )
),
element_counts AS (
    SELECT element, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM carcinogenic_atoms
    GROUP BY element
)
SELECT element
FROM element_counts
WHERE cnt = (SELECT MIN(cnt) FROM element_counts);

SELECT element
FROM atom
WHERE molecule_id IN (
    SELECT molecule_id
    FROM molecule
    WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
)
GROUP BY element
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MIN(cnt)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM atom
        WHERE molecule_id IN (
            SELECT molecule_id
            FROM molecule
            WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
        )
        GROUP BY element
    )
);

final.sql:
SELECT element
FROM atom
WHERE molecule_id IN (
    SELECT molecule_id
    FROM molecule
    WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
)
GROUP BY element
ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC
LIMIT 1;
